text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Seiun Sky during lunch time. Just as I'm
about to call out to her...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sei, that thing you gave me the other day was so
cool! I feel like a million bucks!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh! There are other amazing products too. I've
been making serious bank. Want me to get some
of those too?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please! Oh, hold on! Is it okay if I tell some of my
friends?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. That way everyone benefits. You just
go ahead and spread the good news! See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a shady exchange. I mull over whether I
should say something when...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky! Stop your dubious dealings!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You scared me there! I dunno what you're
talking about though.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't play the fool! "Making bank," "spread the
good news"! It's crystal clear what you're up to!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Ohhh, I get it. You mean that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, this is bad. I'm busted... Gumshoe King has
done it again.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You are sorely mistaken if you think you can get
away with this on my watch! Now, clean up your
act and—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, before that. Do you actually have any kind
of proof?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, you are a detective, right? I'm guessing you've got some decisive evidence or whatever?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of... of course I have! Don't underestimate my
skills in investigation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm really shaking in my boots now. Guess I'd
better get my affairs in order.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... fine, have it your way. I'll do whatever it
takes to catch you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...You over there! Sky's trainer! You've been
eavesdropping all the while!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Assist with my investigation! You're concerned
about Sky too, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As such, I shall grant you the right to suggest a
means of obtaining evidence! Now, speak!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Surveillance, I see! In that case, we must begin at
once!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Phew! Okay, one more lap to go.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky is training by herself? How suspicious! Something must be afoot!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec, is that... Gumshoe King? I see my
trainer's acting as your Watson, then.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's rather rare for you to be training so
diligently... This means you're clearly up to
something!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess it might look a little off... but what
could lil' ol' me possibly be up to?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Th-that would be, um... the illicit manufacturing
of skill-enhancing cleats! Or some such!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Wait a moment—this is a diversion! You've
distracted me with your individual training while
some shady deal is underway elsewhere!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Boy oh boy, that's some imaginative deducing
there. Gotta hand it to you, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! But of course! Now, accept your
defeat!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sure. But maybe you'd better accept yours
first? If you'd kindly look this way...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
These are from back home. They're our prized
veggies.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! You've just been handing out
vegetables?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep. I got a boatload of them sent from home.
I'm overflowing with energy from all the nutrients
I've been getting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wh-why didn't you tell me?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, let's just say I wanted to see how much
detecting the great Dumbshoe King was actually
capable of... Catch ya later!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-w-wait right there! Skyyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo chases after Seiun Sky, and I'm left
speechless as I watch the two of them running
off...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I see! Concrete proof would be more reliable than mere scraps of evidence we might find here or there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We meet up with some of King Halo's pals and
arrange a stakeout...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Boy, I'm beat... It sure isn't easy lugging this around all day long.

text_block_list.name: Bob Cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Umm... King? This is Point A. Sky is currently
resting. From what I can tell, she's got a
suspicious bag under her arm.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right, this is our chance! All units, proceed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Accept your defeat, Sky! You've been caught
red-handed!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We've got you surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yikes! It's the King Detective Agency!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the contents of the dubious bag are
inspected...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is this? There's nothing but vegetables
in here...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And that's precisely all I've been handing out,
vegetables sent to me from back home. My
parents are farmers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Impossible... Was this all brought about by my
own misunderstanding?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh, well, you sure put on a heck of a
show, Dumbshoe King.

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh man... Still, those vegetables look really
delicious, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I can drop some off for you later. I've got
loads.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess that means one more place to stop by on
my delivery run. That's great muscle training and
all, but it'll sure be tough.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I could really use some assistance... Maybe from a
certain someone who suspected I was up to no
good.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: O-oh fine! By way of an apology, I'll help you out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with King Halo's help, Seiun Sky finishes
handing out all her vegetables after a few days.
